content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "邀請喝咖啡",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你明天有空嗎？我們一起去喝咖啡，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù hē kāfēi, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 he1 ka1fei1, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Are you free tomorrow? How about we go for coffee together?",
          "translation_ko": "내일 시간 있으세요? 같이 커피 마시러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可以啊！我明天下午有空。你想去哪裡喝咖啡？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ a! Wǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng qù nǎlǐ hē kāfēi?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3 a5! Wo3 ming2tian1 xia4wu3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 qu4 na3li3 he1 ka1fei1?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! I'm free tomorrow afternoon. Where do you want to go for coffee?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 내일 오후에 시간 있어요. 어디로 커피 마시러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們去車站前面的那家咖啡店，好嗎？那裡的咖啡很好喝。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen qù chēzhàn qiánmiàn de nà jiā kāfēi diàn, hǎo ma? Nàlǐ de kāfēi hěn hǎo hē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3men qu4 che1zhan4 qian2mian4 de5 na4 jia1 ka1fei1 dian4, hao3 ma5? Na4li3 de5 ka1fei1 hen3 hao3 he1.",
          "translation_en": "Let's go to that coffee shop in front of the station, okay? Their coffee is really good.",
          "translation_ko": "역 앞에 있는 그 커피숍에 갈까요? 거기 커피가 아주 맛있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！我們約下午兩點，在咖啡店門口碰面，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, zài kāfēi diàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5! Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, ke3yi3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Great! Let's meet at 2 PM at the coffee shop entrance, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 오후 2시에 커피숍 입구에서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒問題。明天下午兩點見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Ming2tian1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem. See you tomorrow at 2 PM!",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요. 내일 오후 2시에 뵐게요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What time do they plan to meet?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 몇 시에 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["1 PM", "2 PM", "3 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["오후 1시", "오후 2시", "오후 3시"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the tone of invitation and agreement.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice inviting a friend for coffee. Say: '你明天有空嗎？我們一起去喝咖啡，好不好？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "建議時間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們這個週末一起去看電影，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3men zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "How about we go see a movie together this weekend?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可以啊！你想看什麼電影？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ a! Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3 a5! Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2me5 dian4ying3?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! What movie do you want to see?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 무슨 영화 보고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我想看那部新的中文電影。你星期六有空嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng kàn nà bù xīn de zhōngwén diànyǐng. Nǐ xīngqīliù yǒu kòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 kan4 na4 bu4 xin1 de5 zhong1wen2 dian4ying3. Ni3 xing1qi1liu4 you3 kong4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I want to see that new Chinese movie. Are you free on Saturday?",
          "translation_ko": "그 새 중국 영화 보고 싶어요. 토요일에 시간 있으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "星期六上午我要上班，下午可以。我們約下午三點，在電影院門口碰面，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xīngqīliù shàngwǔ wǒ yào shàngbān, xiàwǔ kěyǐ. Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ sān diǎn, zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xing1qi1liu4 shang4wu3 wo3 yao4 shang4ban1, xia4wu3 ke3yi3. Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, hao3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I have to work Saturday morning, but I'm free in the afternoon. Let's meet at 3 PM at the cinema entrance, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "토요일 오전에는 출근해야 하는데 오후에는 괜찮아요. 오후 3시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊！星期六下午三點見。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ sān diǎn jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5! Xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Great! See you Saturday at 3 PM.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 토요일 오후 3시에 뵐게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why can't they meet on Saturday morning?",
          "question_ko": "토요일 오전에 만날 수 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["B is busy", "B has to work", "The movie is in the afternoon"],
          "options_ko": ["B가 바빠서", "B가 출근해야 해서", "영화가 오후에 있어서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, paying attention to suggesting a time and agreeing.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice suggesting a time to meet. Say: '我們約下午三點，在電影院門口碰面，好嗎？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "忙碌婉拒",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你明天有空嗎？我們一起去吃飯，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù chīfàn, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 chi1fan4, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Are you free tomorrow? How about we go eat together?",
          "translation_ko": "내일 시간 있으세요? 같이 밥 먹으러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不好意思，我明天很忙，沒辦法。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ míngtiān hěn máng, méi bànfǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si5, wo3 ming2tian1 hen3 mang2, mei2 ban4fa3.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I'm very busy tomorrow. I can't make it.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다. 내일 너무 바빠서 어쩔 수가 없어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係。那這個週末呢？你有空嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi. Nà zhège zhōumò ne? Nǐ yǒu kòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi5. Na4 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 ne5? Ni3 you3 kong4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. How about this weekend? Are you free?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 그럼 이번 주말은요? 시간 있으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "這個週末我也沒空，因為我要去台北見朋友。我們下次再約，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò wǒ yě méi kòng, yīnwèi wǒ yào qù Táiběi jiàn péngyǒu. Wǒmen xià cì zài yuē, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3 ye3 mei2 kong4, yin1wei4 wo3 yao4 qu4 Tai2bei3 jian4 peng2you3. Wo3men xia4 ci4 zai4 yue1, hao3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I'm not free this weekend either, because I'm going to Taipei to see a friend. Let's make plans another time, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말도 시간이 안 돼요. 타이베이에 친구 만나러 가거든요. 다음에 다시 만나요, 괜찮죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，沒問題。下次再聯絡！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, méi wèntí. Xià cì zài liánluò!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, mei2 wen4ti2. Xia4 ci4 zai4 lian2luo4!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, no problem. Let's get in touch next time!",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 문제없어요. 다음에 연락할게요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why can't B meet this weekend?",
          "question_ko": "B가 이번 주말에 만날 수 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["B is sick", "B is going to Taipei", "B has to work"],
          "options_ko": ["B가 아파서", "B가 타이베이에 가서", "B가 출근해야 해서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, focusing on polite refusal and suggesting another time.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice politely declining an invitation. Say: '不好意思，我明天很忙，沒辦法。我們下次再約，好嗎？'"
    }
  ]
}
